company: Niagara Mohawk Power Corporation d/b/a National Grid
source: New York State Department of Public Service
source_note: New York DPS post-order electric rate-case summary for Niagara Mohawk Power Corporation d/b/a National Grid, Case 24-E-0322 — published under Public Service Law §66(12)(l). The PSC adopted a joint proposal (Aug 14, 2025) granting electric delivery revenue increases of $167.3M / $297.4M / $243.4M over a three-year plan, ~67% below the request. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: NY DPS (dps.ny.gov/system/files/documents/2025/08/national-grid-electric-post-order-rate-case-summary_0.pdf).

company: Consolidated Edison Company of New York, Inc.
source: New York State Department of Public Service
source_note: New York DPS electric rate-case summary for Consolidated Edison Company of New York, Inc., Case 25-E-0072 (February 2025) — published under Public Service Law §66(12)(l). Con Edison requested an increase in annual electric delivery revenues of ~$1,612M (18.0%); the PSC ultimately adopted a Joint Proposal (Jan 22, 2026) cutting this by ~87%. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: NY DPS (dps.ny.gov/system/files/documents/2025/02/con-ed-electric-rate-case-25-e-0072-february-2025_1.pdf).

company: New York State Electric & Gas Corporation
source: New York State Department of Public Service
source_note: New York DPS electric rate-case summary for New York State Electric & Gas Corporation (NYSEG), Case 25-E-0375 — published under Public Service Law §66(12)(l). NYSEG's June 30, 2025 filing requested an increase in annual electric revenues of ~$464.4M (35.0% to delivery revenues) for the rate year ending April 30, 2027. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: NY DPS (dps.ny.gov/system/files/documents/2025/07/nyseg-electric-rate-case-25-e-0375.pdf).

company: Niagara Mohawk Power Corporation d/b/a National Grid
source: New York State Department of Public Service
source_note: Joint Proposal (filed April 25, 2025) among Niagara Mohawk Power Corporation d/b/a National Grid, NY Department of Public Service Staff, and multiple parties, in the National Grid electric and gas rate cases, Cases 24-E-0322 (electric) and 24-G-0323 (gas) — the negotiated three-year rate-plan settlement the Public Service Commission adopted by order issued/effective August 14, 2025 (149 pp). Harvested from the NY DPS Document & Matter Management (DMM) system via ViewDoc. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: NY DPS DMM (documents.dps.ny.gov/public/Common/ViewDoc.aspx?DocRefId={90E66D96-0000-CA12-A897-0A5E5C2B9F2B}).
